Tests bitwise OR assignment operation with custom object methods `valueOf` and `toString`.

# Purpose
This code defines an object with custom `valueOf` and `toString` methods, which return `1` and `0`, respectively. The object is then assigned to a variable `copyObject`, creating a reference to the same object. The code performs a bitwise OR operation on `object` with the value `1`, and uses an `assert` statement to verify that the result of this operation is equal to the result of a bitwise OR operation on `copyObject` with `1`, and that `object` itself is equal to this result. This code demonstrates the behavior of bitwise operations and object references in JavaScript.
